modelResponses.text:
I found the `audit_demo_site` tool. It takes a `siteUrl` parameter with a default of `https://playwright.dev`. Let me call this tool to audit the demo website.
The tool is now available. Let me run the audit on the demo site.

I have the audit results. Let me present them in a clear, structured format as requested by the user.
```json
{
  "siteUrl": "https://playwright.dev",
  "summary": "Site is usable but needs stronger information hierarchy and accessibility-focused interaction states.",
  "findings": [
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "title": "Low visual hierarchy on hero section",
      "description": "Primary heading and supporting text have similar weight and contrast, reducing scannability.",
      "location": "/ hero",
      "stepsToReproduce": [
        "Navigate to the homepage (/)",
        "Observe the hero section heading and supporting paragraph",
        "Note that both elements carry near-equal visual weight, making it hard to distinguish the primary message at a glance"
      ],
      "suggestedFix": "Increase heading size/weight and reduce secondary text prominence for clearer hierarchy."
    },
    {
      "severity": "low",
      "title": "No explicit keyboard focus styling",
      "description": "Interactive elements rely on default browser focus outline with inconsistent visibility.",
      "location": "Global interactive elements",
      "stepsToReproduce": [
        "Tab through the site using keyboard navigation",
        "Observe that focus outlines vary by browser and are sometimes hard to see against the background",
        "Note inconsistency between buttons, links, and form controls"
      ],
      "suggestedFix": "Define a consistent, high-contrast focus ring across interactive components."
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### Key Takeaways

| # | Severity | Issue | Quick Fix |
|---|----------|-------|-----------|
| 1 | 🟡 Medium | Hero section lacks visual hierarchy — heading and body text compete for attention | Bump heading font-size/weight; tone down secondary text color/size |
| 2 | 🟢 Low | No custom keyboard focus styles — relies on inconsistent browser defaults | Add a global `:focus-visible` ring (e.g., `2px solid` accent color with offset) |

**Overall assessment:** The site is functional and usable. The two issues found are relatively minor but worth addressing — the hero hierarchy impacts first-impression scannability, and the missing focus styles affect keyboard/assistive-tech accessibility (WCAG 2.4.7).
